listening.title: Listening: A quick forecast
listening.transcript: I think it will rain tomorrow. It's getting cold, so I will close the window now. The meeting probably won't be too long.

questions.question: What does the speaker think about tomorrow?

listening.title: Listening: Weekend plan
listening.transcript: I am going to visit my hometown this weekend. I already booked the train ticket. My goal this year is to improve my English.
